name: 7q35_q36_LCR_SHFM_region
description: 7q35-q36 region with low-copy repeats and complex SD architecture upstream/around SHH. Hosts rare interstitial duplications causing triphalangeal thumb / preaxial polydactyly via SHH ZRS enhancer dosage effects and recurrent 7q36 deletions.

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple SD clusters across 7q35-q36 including SDs flanking LMBR1 (which contains the SHH-ZRS limb enhancer at intron 5) and HLXB9/MNX1 region SDs.
